items.md: On the cover of this issue a box is labeled "Bark's \[sic] Jiffy Chicken Dinner" — a double joke, since Barks had a chicken farm at San Jacinto, California, in the nineteen-forties. The cover was drawn by Carl Buettner, who was for a time art editor at Western Publishing's West Coast office.
items.value: On the cover of this issue a box is labeled "Bark's [sic] Jiffy Chicken Dinner" — a double joke, since Barks had a chicken farm at San Jacinto, California, in the nineteen-forties. The cover was drawn by Carl Buettner, who was for a time art editor at Western Publishing's West Coast office.
